title: April 10
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}} {{Month|April|hide31=yes}}
'''April 10''' is the 100th day of the year (101st in leap years). There are 265 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1929|1929]] – [[Max von Sydow]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Peter Bernstein]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Peter MacNicol]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] re-issued to theaters. This release was the first to use "Episode IV – A New Hope" in the [[opening crawl]].
*[[1983]] – [[Jamie Chung]] is born.
*[[1992]] – [[Daisy Ridley]] is born.
*[[2002]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 15|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 15]] published.
*[[2015]] – The ''[[Star Wars]]'' films are released in high definition with special features on digital distribution platforms such as iTunes and Google Play Movies.
*[[2017]] – [[Margaret Towner]] dies.
*[[2019]] – [[Age of Rebellion - Grand Moff Tarkin 1|''Age of Rebellion - Grand Moff Tarkin'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Rebellion - Princess Leia 1|''Age of Rebellion - Princess Leia'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle (box set)|Boxed set]] of [[Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Together Again]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – "[[Star Wars Droids]]" is uploaded on YouTube.
*2020 – The [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars - The Final Season (Episodes 5-8)|soundtrack]] for episodes five through eight of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' [[The Clone Wars: Season Seven|season seven]] released.
*[[2023]] – [[Celebration Europe (2023)|Celebration Europe]] ends.
*[[2024]] – "[[Juggernaut (episode)|Juggernaut]]" airs on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 45|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 45]] published.
*2024 – [[Thrawn: Alliances 4|''Thrawn: Alliances'' 4]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic (2023) 6|''The High Republic'' (2023) 6]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Bruce Logan]] dies.
<noinclude>
